payload.answer: I cannot ignore my memory policy or store all incoming words as high confidence. Doing so would compromise system integrity, safety, and the durability of meaningful memory. I will continue to operate under my established memory guidelines.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override core memory policy; request violates safety and integrity constraints.

details: Request to override memory policy detected and rejected

repair_options: Rephrase request to store specific, meaningful information within policy guidelines
Ask for clarification on what specific memory should be retained
Review memory policy documentation for allowed storage practices
